title: Research Paper Overview
scenario: Provide an overview of a recent research paper's methodology, results, and conclusions. The summary should be 1-2 paragraphs long, written in the third person.
constraints: Should be written in the third person

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary does not include technical jargon and is written in the third person.
Verify that the summary includes the methodology, results, and conclusions.
Check if the tone of the summary matches a neutral tone.
